behavior_summary: Handles the 'U8P_FROCK::release' event for a FROCK object: mark/update the passed object with an info/process-exclude operation, check the object's surface weight, and if that weight is zero, award/accumulate 15 dexterity to the avatar.
The function operates on an object reference provided as the event parameter (BP+06h) and only performs the dexterity accumulation when Item::getSurfaceWeight(obj) returns 0.
notable_control_flow: Entry on Event 9 (U8P_FROCK::release) for the FROCK instance.
Perform a 'set info' and 'process exclude' operation on the object referenced by the parameter (likely to mark or disable further processing of that object).
Call external Item::getSurfaceWeight(obj_ref) and store its return in a local (retval).
open_questions: What exact engine semantics do the 'set info' + 'process exclude' operations have here (what info id is set and which object is targeted)?
Does AccumulateDexterity(15) always apply to the player/avatar who released the item, or to a different actor determined by context (inferred to be the avatar but not explicit)?
Why is surface weight==0 used as the condition for awarding dexterity (game-design reason remains inferred)?
Are there additional side effects (e.g., visual/animation cues) tied to the set-info/process-exclude sequence that are not visible in the disassembly?

main_function.name: U8P_FROCK::release
main_function.purpose: Respond to a U8P_FROCK::release event on a FROCK object by marking the object (set-info/process-exclude), checking its surface weight, and awarding 15 dexterity if the weight is zero.
entry_conditions: Event 9 (U8P_FROCK::release) — invoked when the relevant actor/item is released or leaves the trigger region (inferred event semantics).

function_map.name: U8P_FROCK::release
function_map.role: Event handler for the FROCK object's U8P_FROCK::release event

function_map.name: Item::getSurfaceWeight
function_map.role: Query an item's surface weight used to decide whether to award dexterity

function_map.name: U8P_FROCK::AccumulateDexterity
function_map.role: Apply/accumulate dexterity points (called with 15 when weight==0)

external_calls.purpose: Return the surface weight of the object parameter so the script can compare it to zero
Award/accumulate 15 dexterity to the relevant actor when the object's surface weight is zero

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles the 'U8P_FROCK::release' event for a FROCK object: mark/update the passed object with an info/process-exclude operation, check the object's surface weight, and if that weight is zero, award/accumulate 15 dexterity to the avatar.
